name: Peach Salad with Feta
description: This hearty salad is filled with sweet peaches, salty feta, and crunchy pine nuts for a quick and delicious side dish. It's easy to make and perfect for a summer meal!
steps: Divide the mixed greens into two bowls.
Top each bowl with peaches, chopped tomato, feta cheese, and pine nuts.
Drizzle with olive oil and balsamic glaze.
Gently toss to combine, then sprinkle with salt to taste.
